summary: Backend testing for iteration 38 fixes (playlist sort + popular collections). Created pytest suite covering /api/playlists/public/enhanced (all 7 sort_by values + shape), /api/playlists/public/stats, /api/tmdb/collections/popular (popularity/name/size sorts, pagination, search) and existing /api/tmdb/collection/{id} & /api/tmdb/collections/search. All 17 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~4277 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Strongly recommend splitting into routers (playlists, tmdb, auth, ratings, etc.) for maintainability.

_build_popular_collections_index issues unbounded concurrent /movie/{id} requests gated only by a Semaphore(30); with max_pages=25 that is up to ~500 TMDB detail calls on a cold cache — consider persisting the index to Mongo so it survives restarts instead of relying on a 24h in-memory cache only.

/api/playlists/public/enhanced returns 'creator' but test confirmed 'user_info' key is also expected per spec. Currently the projected fields use 'creator'; verify the frontend (HomePage.js, DiscoverPlaylistsPage.js) consumes the right key consistently.
For sort_by=random, pagination params are silently ignored (documented in code). Consider returning page/total_pages=null or a clear flag so clients don't render misleading pagination.
test_credentials: n/a (no auth required for tested endpoints)
seed_data_creation: None — preview Mongo had 0 public playlists; endpoints validated via shape only for playlists. TMDB cache produced 144 unique collections in ~17s (above the >=100 target).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reusable pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration38_playlists_collections.py. The TMDB popular collections index is cached 24h in-memory; first call after a backend restart takes ~15-90s. Tests use a 120s timeout for those calls. Playlists DB is empty in preview env, so any assertion needing actual playlists must seed first (via /api/playlists with auth) — currently shape-only assertions are used.

verified_behaviors.playlists_enhanced: All 7 sort_by values (recent/oldest/likes/dislikes/size/name/random) return 200; shape includes _id, name, items, items_count, likes_count, dislikes_count, creator. No staff pinning observed.
verified_behaviors.collections_popular: total=144 unique collections, total_pages=6 at limit=24. popularity sort verified desc; name sort verified A->Z on page 2; size sort verified desc by movies_count.
verified_behaviors.existing_endpoints: /api/tmdb/collection/10 returns Star Wars collection (id=10); /api/tmdb/collections/search?q=marvel returns list of results; /api/playlists/public/stats returns 200 dict.
